name: Anna Interview Simulator
tagline: A multi-agent mock interview panel that adapts to every answer.
description: AI Interview Simulator gives students, job seekers, and software engineers a realistic panel interview inside Anna. HR, Senior Engineer, and Tech Lead interviewers ask role-specific questions, evaluate answers, score communication and technical depth, identify weak areas, and generate a personalized study plan. Progress and past interviews persist through Anna storage so every session builds on the last one.
